# samkaulebi.shop

> Georgian premium e-commerce store — jewelry, fragrances, and hair & body care.
> ქართული პრემიუმ მაღაზია: სამკაულები, სუნამოები, თავის მოვლა.
> Prices are in GEL (₾). Storefront content is primarily in Georgian.

## Catalog
- Jewelry / სამკაულები: rings, necklaces, earrings, bracelets
- Fragrances / სუნამოები: women's, men's, unisex
- Hair & Body Care / თავის მოვლა: shampoos, hair oils, body care

## Machine-readable resources
- Product feed (JSON): https://samkaulebi.shop/api/feed/products
- Sitemap: https://samkaulebi.shop/sitemap.xml

## Key pages
- All products: https://samkaulebi.shop/shop
- Product detail: https://samkaulebi.shop/product/{id}
- Category: https://samkaulebi.shop/category/{category}
- Subcategory: https://samkaulebi.shop/category/{category}/{subcategory}

## Notes
- Each product page exposes schema.org Product JSON-LD (name, image, price, availability).
